mapper.select: select id, customer_name, phone, gender, driver_license_no, id_card_no, status, created_at, updated_at from customer order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into customer (customer_name, phone, gender, driver_license_no, id_card_no, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{customerName}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{driverLicenseNo}, #{idCardNo}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update customer set customer_name = #{customerName}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, driver_license_no = #{driverLicenseNo}, id_card_no = #{idCardNo}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
